title: Geometry Component
description: The description identifier of the geometry file to use to render this block. This identifier must match an existing geometry identifier in any of the currently loaded resource packs.

anyOf.description: A simple geometry identifier string, or one of the vanilla identifiers.

anyOf.title: Geometry Object
anyOf.description: An object describing the geometry to use.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Specifies the geometry description identifier to use to render this block. This identifier must match an existing geometry identifier in any of the currently loaded resource packs.
